# kCFStreamPropertyFTPProxyHost | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ CFNetwork ](/documentation/cfnetwork)

- [ kCFStreamPropertyFTPProxyHost ](/documentation/CFNetwork/kCFStreamPropertyFTPProxyHost)

-  kCFStreamPropertyFTPProxyHost 

Global Variable# kCFStreamPropertyFTPProxyHost

iOS 2.0–9.0DeprecatediPadOS 2.0–9.0DeprecatedMac Catalyst 13.1–13.1DeprecatedmacOS 10.3–10.11DeprecatedtvOS 9.0–9.0DeprecatedvisionOS 1.0–1.0Deprecated

```
let kCFStreamPropertyFTPProxyHost: CFString
```

Deprecated

Use NSURLSessionAPI for ftp requests

## [Discussion](/documentation/CFNetwork/kCFStreamPropertyFTPProxyHost#Discussion)

FTP Proxy Host stream property key or an FTP Proxy dictionary key for set and copy operations. The value of this property is a CFString containing the host name of a proxy server. This property can be set and copied individually or via a CFDictionary. This property is the same as the `kSCPropNetProxiesFTPProxy` property defined in `SCSchemaDefinitions.h`.
